evals.prompt: This Figma export is 5120x11732 pixels, resize it so Claude can analyze it properly
evals.expected_output: Triggers resize-for-claude skill to scale the image down so the longest side is 1568px
expectations: Should detect tall aspect ratio and split into overlapping tiles if >= 3:1

evals.prompt: Optimize this full-page screenshot for Claude vision before I ask it to review the design
evals.expected_output: Triggers resize-for-claude skill to resize and potentially tile a tall screenshot
expectations: Should output to a -claude/ directory next to the original
Should produce images with longest side <= 1568px

evals.prompt: Take a screenshot of the homepage at mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger resize-for-claude - this is about capturing responsive screenshots, not resizing existing images
expectations: Should NOT trigger resize-for-claude - use responsive-screenshots for capturing at multiple viewports
